reviews.comment:
Hoy fui por primera vez a cargar nafta son un montón de playeros algo no muy común., el punto es que se peleaban para no atenderme termine pasando de surtido en surtidor muchos con conos siendo la cantidad que eran y me mandaron al último cuando el tercero que me había pateado de mala gana se le libera un auto. Ahí falta supervisor presente uno está trabajando y quiere cargar y seguir

(Translated by Google)
Today I went to fill up my tank for the first time. There were a lot of attendants, which isn't very common. The thing is, they were fighting over who wouldn't serve me. I ended up going from pump to pump, many of them with cones, and they finally sent me to the last one when the third attendant, who had rudely pushed me aside, got a free car. They really need a supervisor present. You're working, you want to fill up your tank and keep going.
